purpose: Pre-register V3C-α1.1 (turnover mechanics: rank-buffer + budget=1 + hold-continuation) before backtests so the result cannot be cherry-picked. α1.1 is a TURNOVER-MECHANICS evolution test on top of α1 (10d horizon + 4-factor inverse + drop rsi_in_band). It DOES NOT change the signal hypothesis, factor set, universe, or cost model. Per V3C-α1 task #70 diagnostic, α1 exhibited 89.8% full-refresh trade dates, 100% sell_time_stop exits, 0.81 untouched carry-over per rebal, and 805-959% annual turnover — all symptoms of forced wholesale rebalancing, not signal-driven rotation. α1.1 tests whether a rank-buffer (top-20) + 1-replacement-per-rebal budget + hold-continuation reduces churn without destroying α1's positive same-gross α point estimate (~+0.09 full_20yr).

variant.hypothesis: Under V3C-α1's signal hypothesis (10d horizon + 4-factor inverse + drop rsi_in_band on PIT-liquid top-500), a turnover-mechanics overlay that (a) holds existing positions while their inverse-score rank stays within top-20 candidate buffer, (b) replaces at most 1 existing holding per scheduled rebalance with the top new candidate, and (c) blocks same-day rebuys, will materially reduce annual turnover (target ≤ 300%) and full-refresh rate (target ≤ 30%) while keeping α1's same-gross α point estimate intact within ±50% relative. The hypothesis is OPERATIONAL not ECONOMIC — α1.1 does not change the factor causal story; it changes how the engine executes that story. Strategy-gate pass at v3 §2 hard-gate thresholds (especially IMPL4 ≤ 2.0) remains an independent test that may FAIL even when mechanics pass.
variant.causal_logic_label: Causal logic is questionable/unestablished — turnover mechanics are operational not economic. α1 diagnostic (Task 70) showed 89.8% full-refresh + 100% time_stop sells; α1.1 tests whether rank-buffer + budget=1 mechanism reduces churn without destroying α1's positive same-gross α point estimate. The underlying inverse-momentum thesis is inherited from α1 and is itself unestablished — IC pattern, not economic mechanism.
expected_failure_modes: Rank buffer 20 (= 2.5x top_n_picks) too generous → positions stay too long after signal decays → same-gross α point drops below α1's +0.09 baseline
Budget=1 may starve refresh rate → universe-shift adapts too slowly → walk-forward 2018-2022 / 2022-2026 sub-windows lose adaptive edge
IMPL4 may still FAIL at 200-400% annual turnover — mechanics pass (≤300%) but strategy gate (≤200%) fails — α1.1 verdict = mechanics-only-progress, not paper-ready
16+ year underwater MaxDD persists at -50%+ on full_20yr (mechanics do not change risk overlay; α1 had MaxDD -59%)
Same-day rebuy ban may force gap in entries when hard_stop fires on the best-ranked candidate — slot waits 1 rebal cycle

factor_inputs.name: macd_cross
factor_inputs.normalization: binary 1.0/0.0 from MACD>signal AND signal rising 3 days

factor_inputs.name: rsi_in_band
factor_inputs.normalization: DROPPED per Junyan #8 (α1 inheritance): OOS sign-flip & collapse

factor_inputs.name: limit_up_followup
factor_inputs.normalization: DROPPED per V3A sector-confound + low sector-neutral IC (α1 inheritance)

factor_inputs.name: momentum_5d
factor_inputs.normalization: DROPPED — superseded by momentum_20d 10d horizon (α1 inheritance)

turnover_mechanics.replacement_rule: replace at most 1 existing holding per scheduled rebalance; hard_stop exits do not count against budget, but re-entry waits until next rebalance
turnover_mechanics.hold_continuation_rule: keep existing holdings unless they fall outside top-20 inverse-score candidate buffer

risk_rules.time_stop_status: disabled — superseded by rank_buffer continuation; engine emits sentinel 9999 days for compatibility
risk_rules.limit_up_down_fill_policy: limit-up at T+1 open → BUY unfillable carry; limit-down → SELL unfillable carry
risk_rules.drawdown_breaker_note: v3 research toggle (Junyan PM3 Bug 1): permanent drawdown_to_cash breaker disabled because re-entry-after-N-days logic is not implemented; once triggered the strategy is stuck flat. Production paper trading should leave this False until re-entry logic lands.

mechanics_gates._purpose: α1.1-specific mechanics-pass criteria (Junyan 2026-05-28 PM5 ratify). These are α1.1 milestones, NOT strategy-pass criteria. Strategy gate uses v3 §2 thresholds above. If mechanics pass but strategy fail, verdict = mechanics-only-progress, transition to α1.2 turnover compression, NOT paper.
